title: Destination Lifestyle & Content Photography
intro: Some stories deserve more than a few posed photographs.
body: Shaney can travel with couples, families, creators or destination wedding parties to document the full experience naturally, from the quiet in-between moments to the details, portraits, lifestyle content and main occasion. This service is ideal for destination weddings, influencer trips, family holidays, brand stories, milestone celebrations and clients who want beautiful, natural content without having to rely on phone photos or rushed moments.
valueCopy: Shaney travels for weddings, family gatherings, brand shoots and content trips — anywhere your story is happening. Destination bookings are kept simple and transparent: you cover the travel, and Shaney quotes her photography fee separately — in your own currency, shaped around your days of coverage. She arrives at least a day ahead of your event, unrushed and ready. Even with travel included, working with Shaney typically costs 30–50% less all-in than hiring a comparable photographer in the US, UK or Europe — the exchange rate works in your favour, while the coverage, care and final gallery remain at an international standard. For multi-day trips, the value grows: once Shaney is with you, additional days of lifestyle and content coverage cost far less than booking separate local photographers.
styledMomentsCopy: For destination clients, creators and lifestyle brands, Shaney can capture the real moments as they unfold while also helping plan styled content opportunities that feel natural, beautiful and aligned with the story of the trip.
placeholders: You cover the travel: return flights, accommodation and local transport, plus a small daily meal allowance on travel and shoot days
Shaney's photography fee is quoted separately — in your own currency, shaped around your days of coverage
She arrives at least a day ahead of your event — unrushed and ready
Galleries are delivered within 5–10 working days — weddings and large events within one calendar month
Usage rights for brand and influencer content are agreed per project
Destination dates are limited each year and international travel needs lead time — enquire early to reserve yours
